title: MikroTik R11e-LR2, LoRa miniPCI-e card, 2,4 GHz frequency
description: Thanks to the miniPCIe card R11e-LR2 , you can connect any MikroTik device to the LoRa network that has a slot for placing a miniPCI-e card The card supports 4 different Rx channels from the 2.4 GHz frequency band ( 2403 MHz, 2425 MHz, 2450 MHz, 2479 MHz ), one Tx channel, total transmission 10 dBm and one u.Fl and MMCX connector which is used to connect the antennas LoRa is a solution for wireless data transmission, where the main goal is the lowest possible power consumption at low acquisition costs and a small data flow is sufficient MikroTik LoRa products are ready (not only) for the global network The Things Network - a well-known open source infrastructure that provides coverage of LoRa networks and thousands of useful applications. With The Things Network, you can get started with the Internet of Things in a single day. You can also easily upgrade to enterprise The Things Industries
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency LoRa 2.4 GHz Connectors and Interfaces Bus type miniPCI-e RF connectors (1) MMCX, (1) u.Fl Physical characteristics Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 70 Width [mm] 30 Height [mm] 5 Depth [mm] 51
